headline: Assessing Digital Realty (DLR) Valuation After Record Leasing And Expanded AI Data Center Investments
summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) is back in the spotlight after a busy stretch that included record leasing, expanded AI focused data center investments, and new European footholds in Lisbon and Sofia through targeted interconnection acquisitions. See our latest analysis for Digital Realty Trust. At a latest share price of $180.40, Digital Realty Trust has seen momentum build, with a 30 day share price return of 4.56% and a 90 day gain of 17.42%.
